texto: We need an army of white-haired, wild-eyed radicals cutting a swath against the sexism that crosses our paths. It is a good antidote to the larger community’s apparent belief that older women are slightly dotty, grandmotherly, benign souls.
explicacao: Citação de Shari Graydon sobre temas ligados a familia. “We need an army of white-haired, wild-eyed radicals cutting a swath against the sexism that cross…” articula familia, aging, women em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como women.
